creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
databases/postgresql94-(clent|server) both compile for me on a fresh CURRENT.  Portsmon is showing this as valid on all releases.  This should be closed 'feedback timeout' if there is no update.

Ref:
http://portsmon.FreeBSD.org/portoverview.py?category=databases&portname=postgresql94-client
http://portsmon.FreeBSD.org/portoverview.py?category=databases&portname=postgresql94-server
